title: Tenant ID computation → sha256(team:user).slice(0,16)
evidence: All 5 TC-018 tests passed in 7ms (369/369 total, 54 files): - ✓ TC-018: computes sha256(T12345:U67890).slice(0,16) correctly - ✓ TC-018: result is exactly 16 hex characters - ✓ TC-018: is deterministic for same inputs - ✓ TC-018: different users produce different IDs - ✓ TC-018: different teams produce different IDs `computeTenantId('T12345','U67890')` → matches `createHash('sha256').update('T12345:U67890').digest('hex').slice(0,16)`, length=16, all lowercase hex.
